mapper.select:
SELECT f.id, f.pid, f.name, f.description, f.phone, f.address, f.founder_name, f.member_count, f.tomb_count, f.create_time, pf.name AS parent_name FROM family f LEFT JOIN family pf ON pf.id = f.pid AND pf.del_flag = 0
AND f.name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{param.keyword, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, '%')
AND f.del_flag = 0
ORDER BY f.id DESC
SELECT f.id, f.pid, f.name, f.description, f.member_count, f.tomb_count FROM family f WHERE f.del_flag = 0 ORDER BY f.id ASC
